\section*{{\large\textsc{Student Mentoring, Advising, and Research Activities}}}

\subsection*{Undergraduate Academic Advisor @ DKU}
\begin{itemize}
\item Served as primary academic advisor for \textbf{25} students (Classes
of 2022\textendash 2029).
\item Provide continuous guidance on course selection, career planning,
and graduate school applications.
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{Undergraduate Signature Work (SW)\protect\footnote{https://signature-work.dukekunshan.edu.cn/signature-work-overview/}
($\protect\cong$ Honor Thesis) Mentor @ DKU \& Undergraduate Student
Research Projects}
\begin{itemize}
\item Mentored \textbf{10 SW projects} (Class of 2023\textendash 24) @DKU
on topics ranging from Random Walks to Quantum Algorithms.
\item Undergraduate Student Research Highlights \& Outcomes:
\begin{itemize}
\item Awarded Summer Research Program\footnote{https://ugstudies.dukekunshan.edu.cn/student-summer-research-program/}
for the years 2022, 2023, and 2026. 
\item Peer-Reviewed Publications: Guided 4 students to co-author papers
in international journals (see items {[}29{]}, {[}35{]}, {[}38{]},
{[}39{]} in Publications/Papers).
\item Software Development: Directed the development of 2 Mathematica packages
for Method of Brackets and Weakly Increasing Trees, leading to SW
projects. 
\item International Collaboration: Co-mentored international research on
Cyclotomic Polynomials with Prof. K. Dilcher (Dalhousie University).
\end{itemize}
\end{itemize}
